description: Integration: Wire privacy-ads into ads backend, update ads-api service, update status/gate tracking, and run full pipeline validation
steps: 1. Update `apps/quantads/backend/app.ts` to register a new privacy-ads route prefix. Create `apps/quantads/backend/routes/privacy-ads.ts` with endpoints: POST /privacy-ads/candidates (returns 50 candidates for on-device ranking), POST /privacy-ads/feedback (receives aggregate clicked/dismissed), GET /privacy-ads/disclosure/:adId (returns why-this-ad info).

2. Create `apps/quantads/backend/services/privacy-ad-serving.service.ts` - uses @quant/privacy-ads contextual targeting and privacy enforcer to serve candidates. Never includes user profile in response payload. Validates all responses through PrivacyEnforcerService.

3. Update `services/ads-api/package.json` to add @quant/privacy-ads dependency. Update `services/ads-api/src/main.ts` to import and initialize the privacy-ads health check or register a startup validation.

4. Write backend integration tests: `apps/quantads/backend/__tests__/privacy-ad-serving.service.test.ts` - verifies 50 candidates returned, no user features leaked, disclosure present on every ad response.
5. Update `.agents/state/quant-autonomous-status.json` to mark phase 29 and 30 as completed and update gates.
6. Run full pipeline: pnpm install, pnpm typecheck, pnpm test, pnpm build, pnpm lint - all must pass.
acceptance_criteria: Privacy-ads routes serve 50 candidates without user profile data
Feedback endpoint accepts only aggregate signals (clicked/dismissed boolean)
Disclosure endpoint always returns 1-2 signals per ad
services/ads-api starts without errors with new dependency
All existing tests continue to pass (no regressions)
Full monorepo pipeline passes: typecheck, test, build, lint
